providers.name: Graphify
providers.usage_note: Use Graphify CLI query/path/explain for project-graph candidates. Confirmed setup should keep the generated graph usable with project-level `graphify hook install`; treat hook refresh as provider-native. Treat SKILL/MCP install as user-owned host convenience and GRAPH_REPORT.md as provider-owned backing store or bounded fallback.

commands_display.macos: create .spec-first/tools/graphify wrapper that runs UV_CACHE_DIR=.spec-first/cache/uv uvx --from graphifyy==0.8.35 graphify
commands_display.linux: create .spec-first/tools/graphify wrapper that runs UV_CACHE_DIR=.spec-first/cache/uv uvx --from graphifyy==0.8.35 graphify
commands_display.windows: create .spec-first/tools/graphify.ps1/.cmd wrapper that runs UV_CACHE_DIR=.spec-first/cache/uv uvx --from graphifyy==0.8.35 graphify

installation.next_action: Run `$spec-mcp-setup` and confirm the CodeGraph/Graphify provider pack, or use `$spec-mcp-setup --only graphify` for headless/subset install-init. Add `--requirement-workspace <repo-relative-path>` only when Graphify input scope should be narrower than the project workspace. version_pin 已用 `pip index versions graphifyy` 实测到 PyPI 当前发布版本 0.8.35。

safety.install_effect: Creates a workspace-local graphify CLI wrapper under `.spec-first/tools/` (PyPI package graphifyy; the graphifyy->graphify name mismatch is the maintainer's temporary naming while the graphify name is reclaimed, not a typosquat — still verify the bin matches). The wrapper uses workspace-local uv cache under `.spec-first/cache/uv`; Graphify SKILL/MCP install writes host runtime surfaces and remains a user-owned convenience layer. Project graph generation uses the headless `graphify extract <path> --out .spec-first/workspace/providers/graphify/graphify-out --no-cluster` path (AST is deterministic/no-LLM; semantic clustering skipped). Confirmed provider-pack setup also targets project-level `graphify hook install` so later `graphify update <path>` refresh is triggered by provider-native hooks; `--watch` is long-running and is not started by setup.
